name: QDI Sandbox
postCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y clang cmake && clang++ -shared -o qdi-core/libqdi_mock.so -Iqdi-core/include qdi-core/src/qdi_mock.cpp -std=c++17 -fPIC && pip install fastapi uvicorn httpx aws-lambda-powertools aws-xray-sdk
postStartCommand: nohup python qdi-core/python/qdi_demo_server.py > server.log 2>&1 & nohup python -m http.server 3000 --bind 0.0.0.0 --directory qdi-core/python > web.log 2>&1 &
